# High Pressure Foam Analyzer

**Summary**: An instrument used to assess foam stability, structure, and bubble size under elevated pressure.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-gowida|Gowida, 2024]] utilized HPFA to evaluate the foam's behavior in conditions mimicking downhole environments.

- The system allowed for simultaneous measurement of foam height and structure over time through optical methods. ([[2024-gowida|Gowida, 2024, p. 34]])
